test_cases.ground_truth: MacBook Air M4 ($999): Apple M4 chip, 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 13.6" display, 1.24kg. Dell XPS 15 ($1299): Intel i7-13700H, 16GB DDR5, 512GB SSD, 15.6" 3.5K OLED, 1.86kg. Best value: MacBook Air M4.
